{{Quote|She's good with a blaster, and has little fear of danger—as long as she's properly motivated by alcohol or entertainment. I've hired her on occasion when I needed some firepower or when I knew an extra blaster wouldn't hurt. And while I can't always pay her much, Nell doesn't seem to mind as long as she can have her fun along the way.|[[Platt Okeefe]]|<ref name="SL">{{JournalCite|7|Smuggler's Log}}</ref>}}
'''Nell Indigo''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Wroonian/Legends|Wroonian]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] who frequented the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

As a child, Nell traveled with her gun-runner parents, learning all about the smuggling trade and making a few business contacts along the way. Since she was a member of a smuggling family, she was expected to help out in many ways like running their light freighter.

When she was old enough, her parents asked her to go out on her own and make something of herself according to the traditional coming-of-age protocol for Wroonians.

Nell apprenticed herself to a Wroonian mercenary and quickly learned the ropes. When she was 20, she bought her way into the [[Guild of Glorious Mercenaries]] and used the guild connections to land several successful and adventurous jobs in the Outer Rim.
